data.body: Full make test: 5498 passed, 1 failed, 24 skipped. The 1 failure (test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module) is a LOCAL-ONLY artifact: my .venv is inside the worktree, so yaml resolves to a path under the repo root and the classifier labels it repo-local instead of third-party. My diff does NOT touch resolve_symbol/grounding (verified). In CI (gerrit-verify) site-packages is outside the checkout, so it passes. origin/main advanced again (0a6bea0e4 review-gates) -> rebased again (clean, 12 commits). All my drift gates + 43 tests pass on the new tip; working tree clean. Pushing stack to Gerrit.
